requires.purpose: Base Legal Office matter structure, review gates, document categories, and controlled AI boundary policy.
Court letters, claims, responses, court orders, proof of service, evidence attachments, deadline notes, and review summaries.
Controlled workflow orchestration for court intake, document registration, owner assignment, filing/service review, followup, and closing.
Deadline control, responsible owner assignment, deadline followup, and timeline update reminders.
Party, court, counterparty, representative, and service-recipient contact context.

optionalDependencies.purpose: Court communication history and controlled party/court communication logs.
AI-assisted timeline summaries and filing/service checklist suggestions for human review.
Risk tags for missing references, unassigned deadlines, missing proof of service, and overdue followup.
